Tabs root wrapper.

# Import

```ts
import { Tabs } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui";
```

# Accepted Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | Controlled tab value. |
| `defaultValue` | `string` | Uncontrolled tab value. |
| `onValueChange` | `function` | Tab selection handler. |
